title: astephanus dumosus
intro: Astephanus dumosus, also known as the "thorny head", is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Astephanus dumosus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
